mapper.select: SELECT post_id, p.user_id as user_id, title, content, views, likes, p.created_at as created_at, u.email as email FROM posts as p LEFT JOIN users as u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE is_deleted IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM posts WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND is_deleted IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET is_deleted=now() WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = now() WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
